title: Joint
description: Joint: A joint describing linked degrees of freedom between nodes. Relates the displacement or force at the constrained degree of freedom to the primary degree of freedom without considering eccentricities.

PrimaryNode.description: Defines the primary node of the joint. Node: 0D finite element for structural analysis. Node class contains positional information as well as orientation and support.

ConstrainedNode.description: Defines the constrained node of the joint. Node: 0D finite element for structural analysis. Node class contains positional information as well as orientation and support.

X.description: True defines a rigid connectivity between primary and constrained node for translations along the X-axis, i.e. true prohibits relative translation along the X-axis between primary and constrained node.

Y.description: True defines a rigid connectivity between primary and constrained node for translations along the Y-axis, i.e. true prohibits relative translation along the Y-axis between primary and constrained node.

Z.description: True defines a rigid connectivity between primary and constrained node for translations along the Z-axis, i.e. true prohibits relative translation along the Z-axis between primary and constrained node.

XX.description: True defines a rigid connectivity between primary and constrained node for rotations about the X-axis, i.e. true prohibits relative rotation about the X-axis between primary and constrained node.

YY.description: True defines a rigid connectivity between primary and constrained node for rotations about the Y-axis, i.e. true prohibits relative rotation about the Y-axis between primary and constrained node.

ZZ.description: True defines a rigid connectivity between primary and constrained node for rotations about the Z-axis, i.e. true prohibits relative rotation about the Z-axis between primary and constrained node.

StageList.description: List of analysis stages where the joint should be active as a list of integers. If none specified 'all' will be applied.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
